description: README still describes the pre-topology model: .balls/tasks/ tracked on main, commits like balls:claim/review/close landing on main, .gitignore missing .balls/tasks + .balls/worktree, no mention of the state branch, delivered_in, symlinks, or half-push detection. Sections to overhaul: File and Folder Layout, Task File Schema (add delivered_in), Worktree Lifecycle (squash merge, state branch writes), Conflict Resolution (most conflicts handled by merge=union now, not the custom resolver), CLI Commands bl init/claim/review/close/sync, Config tasks_dir section. Include a new section on the state branch and delivery tag. User-facing blocker: first thing a crates.io visitor reads. Reference docs/SPEC-orphan-branch-state.md.
title: Rewrite README for orphan-branch topology
